---
title: "QB3 Early-Stage Mentoring Application"
subtitle: "Winter 2026 Submission"
date: 2025-10-10
author:
  - name: "Shahin Mohammadi"
    email: "mohammadi@cytognosis.org"
    affiliation: "Cytognosis Foundation"

format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    theme: cosmo
    self-contained: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: letter
    fontsize: 11pt
    margin-left: 1in
    margin-right: 1in
    margin-top: 1in
    margin-bottom: 1in
  docx:
    toc: true

# Content is loaded from content.yml via metadata-file
metadata-files:
  - content.yml
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import yaml
from pathlib import Path

# ── Load template and content ──────────────────────────────────────────────
template = yaml.safe_load(Path("_template.yml").read_text())
content = yaml.safe_load(Path("content.yml").read_text())

def get_value(content_dict, section_id, field_id):
    """Get a field value from the content dict."""
    section = content_dict.get(section_id, {})
    return section.get(field_id)

def render_field(field, value):
    """Render a single field as markdown."""
    label = field["label"]
    required = " *" if field.get("required") else ""
    hint = field.get("hint", "")
    ftype = field.get("type", "text")
    
    lines = [f"### {label}{required}\n"]
    
    if hint:
        lines.append(f"> _{hint}_\n")
    
    if ftype == "choice":
        options = field.get("options", [])
        for opt in options:
            check = "x" if value == opt else " "
            lines.append(f"- [{check}] {opt}")
        lines.append("")
    elif ftype in ("name", "address"):
        subfields = field.get("subfields", [])
        lines.append("| Field | Value |")
        lines.append("|-------|-------|")
        for sf in subfields:
            sf_value = value.get(sf["id"], "") if isinstance(value, dict) else ""
            lines.append(f"| {sf['label']} | {sf_value} |")
        lines.append("")
    elif ftype == "file":
        if value:
            lines.append(f"📎 {value}\n")
        else:
            lines.append("_No file uploaded._\n")
    else:
        if value:
            lines.append(f"{value}\n")
        else:
            lines.append("_[Not provided]_\n")
    
    return "\n".join(lines)

# ── Render all sections ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for section in template["sections"]:
    section_id = section["id"]
    section_title = section["title"]
    note = section.get("note")
    
    print(f"## {section_title}\n")
    
    if note:
        print(f"::: {{.callout-note}}")
        print(f"{note}")
        print(f":::\n")
    
    for field in section["fields"]:
        value = get_value(content, section_id, field["id"])
        print(render_field(field, value))

# ── Footer ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
footer = template.get("template", {}).get("footer")
if footer:
    print("---\n")
    print(f"_{footer}_\n")
    print("> **\\* = Required field**")
```
